---
title: "Data Release"
format: html
css: styles.css
---

# Bombay High Court and NCLT Data Release

This page provides access to our dataset containing Bombay High Court and NCLT case data for specific case types. Download the CSV file below and explore key details about the data.

## Download Dataset

[Download Case Data](bhc_data.csv){.btn download=true}

## Facts About the Data

**Name**: *Bombay High Court and NCLT Case Data*  
**Description**: Case records from Bombay High Court and National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) for selected case types.  

**Data Description**:

- `matter_id`: Unique identifier for each record  
- `court_name`: Name of the court where the case was filed
- `filing_no`: Case filing number  
- `filing_date`: Date the case was filed  
- `disposal_date`: Date the case was disposed  
- `hearing_id`: Unique identifier for hearing  
- `hearing_date`: Date of the hearing  
- `case_status`: Current status of the case (e.g., Pending, Disposed)  
- `case_typology`: Type of case (e.g., Commercial Suits, Suits, Summary Suits)  

---

**Source**: Bombay High Court and NCLT  
The last date of updation is reflected in the dataset itself.

**Research**
1.[Helping litigants make informed choices in resolving debt disputes](https://blog.theleapjournal.org/2023/06/helping-litigants-make-informed-choices.html#gsc.tab=0) — Pavithra Manivannan, Susan Thomas, and Bhargavi Zaveri-Shah, Leap Blog, June 2023
2. [Evaluating courts from a litigant's perspective: A project report](https://www.xkdr.org/paper/evaluating-courts-from-a-litigants-perspective-a-project-report) - Pavithra Manivannan, Geetika Palta, Susan Thomas, and Bhargavi Zaveri-Shah, December 2023


## Tips for Exploration

Use tools like **Excel**, **R**, or **Python** to analyze the data and build insights.

---
